channel.title: 战况追踪 — Global Conflict Monitor
channel.description: 实时追踪全球主要冲突态势，多源聚合情报

item.title: [俄乌战争] VOLGOGRAD → nan : Use conventional military force, not specified below (Volgograd, Volgogradskaya Oblast', Russia)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: VOLGOGRAD / nan. Location: Volgograd, Volgogradskaya Oblast', Russia. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 10 sources.

item.title: [俄乌战争] RUSSIAN → nan : Use conventional military force, not specified below (Israel)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: RUSSIAN / nan. Location: Israel. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 2 sources.

item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: RUSSIAN / KYIV. Location: Oreshnik, Kirovskaya Oblast', Russia. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 1 sources.

item.description: GDELT Event: Sexually assault. Actors: ISRAEL / nan. Location: Gaza, Israel (general), Israel. Goldstein Scale: -9.0. Mentioned in 10 sources.
